adminer.name: Adminer
adminer.description: Web-based database management for PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, and more — single PHP file, fast and lightweight
adminer.author: Jakub Vrána

4.install: apk add --no-cache php83 php83-pdo php83-pdo_sqlite php83-pdo_pgsql php83-pdo_mysql php83-session && mkdir -p static && wget -q -O static/index.php https://github.com/vrana/adminer/releases/download/v4.8.1/adminer-4.8.1.php

sqlite-web.name: SQLite Browser
sqlite-web.description: Web-based SQLite database browser and query editor with syntax highlighting
sqlite-web.author: Charles Leifer

0.6.install: apk add --no-cache py3-pip python3 && pip3 install --break-system-packages sqlite-web

minio.name: MinIO
minio.description: S3-compatible object storage with web console — store blobs, backups, and static assets
minio.author: MinIO Inc

gitea.name: Gitea
gitea.description: Lightweight self-hosted Git forge with issues, pull requests, CI/CD, and package registry
gitea.author: Gitea

1.post_install:
mkdir -p data/repositories data/lfs && printf '[server]
HTTP_PORT = %s
ROOT_URL = http://localhost:%s/
[repository]
ROOT = %s/data/repositories
' "${PORT}" "${PORT}" "$APP_DIR" > data/app.ini

grafana.name: Grafana
grafana.description: Monitoring dashboards — visualize metrics from Prometheus, InfluxDB, PostgreSQL, and more
grafana.author: Grafana Labs

prometheus.name: Prometheus
prometheus.description: Time-series monitoring and alerting with built-in web UI, PromQL query language, and scrape targets
prometheus.author: Cloud Native Computing Foundation

2.post_install:
mkdir -p data/tsdb && printf 'global:
  scrape_interval: 15s
scrape_configs:
  - job_name: vulos
    static_configs:
      - targets: ["localhost:8080"]
' > data/prometheus.yml

ttyd.name: ttyd
ttyd.description: Share your terminal over the web — full terminal emulation via WebSocket in the browser
ttyd.author: Shuanglei Tao

httpbin.name: httpbin
httpbin.description: HTTP request/response testing service — inspect headers, methods, status codes, and more
httpbin.author: Kenneth Reitz

0.9.install: apk add --no-cache py3-pip python3 && pip3 install --break-system-packages httpbin gunicorn

jupyter.name: Jupyter Lab
jupyter.description: Interactive notebooks for Python, data science, and computation — web-based IDE with rich output
jupyter.author: Project Jupyter

4.install: apk add --no-cache py3-pip python3 && pip3 install --break-system-packages jupyterlab

nginx.name: Nginx
nginx.description: High-performance HTTP server and reverse proxy — serve static sites, proxy other services
nginx.author: F5 / Igor Sysoev

caddy.name: Caddy
caddy.description: Modern web server with automatic HTTPS, HTTP/3, and dead-simple config
caddy.author: Matthew Holt

2.post_install:
printf ':%s root * %s/static file_server ' "${PORT}" "$APP_DIR" > data/Caddyfile && mkdir -p static && echo '

Caddy is running

' > static/index.html

syncthing.name: Syncthing
syncthing.description: Peer-to-peer file synchronization with web UI — sync folders across devices without a cloud
syncthing.author: Syncthing Foundation

miniflux.name: Miniflux
miniflux.description: Minimalist RSS/Atom feed reader — clean web UI, keyboard shortcuts, full-text search
miniflux.author: Frédéric Guillot

2.install: apk add --no-cache miniflux postgresql16 postgresql16-client && mkdir -p /run/postgresql && chown postgres:postgres /run/postgresql
2.post_install: su postgres -c 'pg_isready -h /run/postgresql || (initdb -D data/pgdata && pg_ctl -D data/pgdata -l data/pg.log start && createdb miniflux)' || true

navidrome.name: Navidrome
navidrome.description: Modern music server with web player — Subsonic-compatible, lightweight, fast library scanning
navidrome.author: Deluan Quintão

transmission.name: Transmission
transmission.description: Lightweight BitTorrent client with web UI — simple, fast, low resource usage
transmission.author: Transmission Project

headscale.name: Headscale
headscale.description: Self-hosted coordination server for Tailscale — manage your own mesh VPN network
headscale.author: Headscale

0.23.post_install:
mkdir -p data && printf 'server_url: http://localhost:%s
listen_addr: 0.0.0.0:%s
db_type: sqlite3
db_path: %s/data/headscale.db
' "${PORT}" "${PORT}" "$APP_DIR" > data/config.yaml
